properties.statement: Accepts a single parameter named items, annotated as a list.
Returns a new list; the original input is left unchanged rather than mutated in place.
Consecutive (adjacent) equal values are collapsed into a single occurrence.
Non-adjacent duplicate values are preserved; only adjacent repeats are removed.
The relative order of the retained elements is maintained.
An empty input list returns an empty list.
A single-element list is returned unchanged with its one element.
Comparison uses equality, so the first element of each adjacent run is the one kept.
